name: 2pk Wave Medium Decorative Basket Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Create a beautiful, organized space with the 2-Pack Wave Medium Decorative Basket from Brightroom™. This set of two baskets comes in a medium size to give you ample space for storing all of your essentials. The gray baskets are designed in a rectangular shape and feature a wave pattern for an elegantly textured look. Made of plastic, these decorative baskets are compatible with the 13-inch cube storage system. Best of all, they come with side cut-out handles for easy movement from one place to another.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
